Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fingerling]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Fingerling is a pink, serpentine dragon spirit bonded to Jai Chen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Fingerling is a pink dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Fingerling is a bonded spirit held by Jai Chen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Fingerling breathes a strange pink madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Fingerling is growing tired and drifting lower in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Fingerling flew around Jai Chen while remaining alert.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Little Blue battles Jai Chen’s spirit, Fingerling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Fingerling was being poked with a drudge shaped like a spiky ball.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Fingerling can spray destructive pink light.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Chen unleashes the Fingerling technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Fingerling makes a high-pitched keening noise.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Fingerling croons on Jai Chen's shoulder.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
